1302: ## AR-015: Idle Cleanup (agentd) (Detailed)

1331: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error)
1332: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error
1333: ```
1334: 
1335: ### Reconcile Algorithm
1336: 1. Get Sandbox object; if NotFound, return empty result
1337: 2. Read annotation `last-activity-time`
1338: 3. If missing/empty, return empty result (no requeue)
1339: 4. Parse as RFC3339; on error, requeue after 30s
1340: 5. Compute `expirationTime = lastActivity.Add(15m)`
1341: 6. If `time.Now().After(expirationTime)`, delete Sandbox
1342: 7. Else, requeue after `time.Until(expirationTime)`

2239:     client.Client
2240:     Scheme *runtime.Scheme
2241: }
2242: 
2243: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error)
2244: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error
2245: ```
2246: 
2247: #### Reconcile Algorithm
2248: 
2249: 1. Get Sandbox object; if NotFound, return empty result
2250: 2. Read annotation `last-activity-time` (from workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey)
2251: 3. If missing/empty, return empty result (no requeue)
2252: 4. Parse as RFC3339; on error, requeue after 30s with error
2253: 5. Compute `expirationTime = lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)`
2254: 6. If `time.Now().After(expirationTime)`, delete Sandbox (treat NotFound as success)
2255: 7. Else, requeue after `time.Until(expirationTime)`
2256:
